name: error_manager_run_all_discoverable_rules_on_active_model
desc: Run ALL error checking rules against the current model and return a consolidated test report.

parameters.name: skip_stubs
parameters.description: Skip rules marked as stubs (default: true)

parameters.name: group_filter
parameters.description: Optional: only run rules in this navigator group (Checking, Coordination, Mechanical, Electrical, Custom, Legends & Notes)

parameters.name: timeout_seconds
parameters.description: Max seconds per rule before marking as timeout (default: 30)
